heading: Lighting violations involving transporting controlled substances by aircraft not providing air transportation
label: 46315 Lighting violations involving transporting controlled substances by aircraft not providing air transportation

children.heading: .—Application
children.label: a .—Application
children.text: This section applies only to aircraft not used to provide air transportation.

the person knowingly and willfully operates an aircraft in violation of a regulation or requirement of the Administrator of the Federal Aviation Administration related to the display of navigation or anticollision lights;
the person is knowingly transporting a controlled substance by aircraft or aiding or facilitating a controlled substance offense; and

children.label: A
children.text: is punishable by death or imprisonment for more than one year under a law of the United States or a State; or

children.label: B
children.text: is provided in connection with an act punishable by death or imprisonment for more than one year under a law of the United States or a State related to a controlled substance (except a law related to simple possession of a controlled substance).
